name: Pumpkin and Chickpea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Dried Chickpeas, soaked overnight in water and drained
2 tbsp Flour dissolved in 1/4 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a pan and stir-fry the onions until they turn golden.
2. Add the chickpeas, pumpkin, honey, salt, and pepper to the pan. Stir-fry the mixture over moderate heat for 5 minutes.
3. Pour in the water and bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat to moderate and cook for 30 minutes.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture (2 tbsp flour dissolved in 1/4 cup water) to the soup, stirring constantly until it thickens. Cook over low heat for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
